title: Fake IPO Investment Advisory Scam
description: I joined a Telegram group named @PrimeReturnsVIP after receiving a call from +91 9765432109. The advisor claimed to represent Prime Wealth Advisory and promised guaranteed IPO allotments. I transferred ₹75,000 to bank account 456789XXXX5528 but never received any shares or refund.

title: Cryptocurrency Investment Fraud
description: A representative of Prime Wealth Advisory contacted me from +91 9765432109 and invited me to join Telegram channel @PrimeReturnsVIP. They convinced me to invest ₹1,20,000 in cryptocurrency through bank account 456789XXXX5528. After the transfer, they stopped responding.

title: AI Trading Platform Scam
description: I was promised daily profits through an AI-powered trading platform operated by Prime Wealth Advisory. The fraudster communicated using +91 9765432109 and Telegram @PrimeReturnsVIP. I deposited ₹58,000 into bank account 456789XXXX5528 and never recovered the money.

title: Forex Trading Fraud
description: A caller from +91 9765432109 convinced me to invest in forex trading through Prime Wealth Advisory. They directed me to Telegram group @PrimeReturnsVIP and requested ₹90,000 in bank account 456789XXXX5528. My investment vanished within two days.

title: Gold Investment Scheme Scam
description: Prime Wealth Advisory advertised a gold investment plan with guaranteed monthly returns. I communicated with their representative on +91 9765432109 and Telegram @PrimeReturnsVIP before transferring ₹65,000 to account 456789XXXX5528. The promised returns never arrived.

title: Intraday Trading Fraud
description: I received stock trading tips from Prime Wealth Advisory after joining Telegram @PrimeReturnsVIP. The advisor instructed me to deposit ₹42,000 into bank account 456789XXXX5528. The contact number used throughout the communication was +91 9765432109. The group disappeared after collecting payments.

title: Mutual Fund Investment Scam
description: A person claiming to work for Prime Wealth Advisory contacted me on +91 9765432109 and offered exclusive mutual fund investments. I transferred ₹84,000 to account 456789XXXX5528 after following instructions from Telegram @PrimeReturnsVIP. I later realized it was fraudulent.

title: Guaranteed Stock Returns Fraud
description: I was promised 30 percent monthly returns by Prime Wealth Advisory through Telegram @PrimeReturnsVIP. The representative using phone number +91 9765432109 instructed me to deposit ₹1,50,000 into bank account 456789XXXX5528. After payment, all communication channels disappeared.
